residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 286-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: Manual motif-based mapping for TEM-family class A beta-lactamase active-site residues onto the ProteinGym BLAT_ECOLX target sequence.
evidence: Use as a curated starting point. Before publication, validate against UniProt feature annotations and a structure such as the ProteinGym BLAT_ECOLX PDB mapping.
